ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the company's profile */,
  "homepage_url" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the company */,
  "category_list" TEXT /* Categories the company belongs to (e.g., Entertainment, Politics) */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market the company operates in (e.g., News, Games) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., operating, acquired) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the company's headquarters */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the company's headquarters */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the company's headquarters */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_at" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "founded_month" TEXT /* Month the company was founded */,
  "founded_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter the company was founded */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the company record was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the company is publicly traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's Initial Public Offering (IPO), if applicable */,
  "valuation_usd" INTEGER /* Current valuation of the company in USD */,
  "last_funding_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the last funding type of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_last_funding_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_funding_type_id") REFERENCES funding_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the funding round belongs to */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., seed, venture, angel) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of funding in USD */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date the funding round occurred */,
  "announced_at" TEXT /* Date the funding round was announced */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date the funding round was closed */,
  "pre_money_valuation_usd" INTEGER /* Pre-money valuation of the company in USD */,
  "post_money_valuation_usd" INTEGER /* Post-money valuation of the company in USD */,
  "lead_investor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the lead investor in the funding round */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the funding round details are confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_lead_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the investor's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the investor */,
  "founded_at" TEXT /* Date the investor was founded */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the investor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the investor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the investor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding round the investment belongs to */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who made the investment */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the investment in USD */,
  "is_lead_investor" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the investor is the lead investor in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_funding" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the funding information belongs to */,
  "funding_total_usd" INTEGER /* Total funding received by the company in USD */,
  "first_funding_at" TEXT /* Date of the company's first funding round */,
  "last_funding_at" TEXT /* Date of the company's last funding round */,
  "number_of_funding_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of funding rounds the company has had */,
  "average_funding_per_round_usd" INTEGER /* Average amount of funding per round in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "founders" (
  "founder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each founder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the founder belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the founder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the founder in the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the founder */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the founder is currently associated with the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("founder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_founders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the office belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the office */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the office */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the office */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the office address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the office address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "is_headquarters" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the office is the headquarters */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the office record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
